Home.title: Trajanov
Home.headline: When the timer hits zero, the drop is live.
Home.sub: 3 to 5 pieces. Real, limited stock. Cash on delivery.

Catalog.title: Catalog
Catalog.live: The drop is live — stock is real and limited.
Catalog.countdownIntro: The drop isn't open yet. Browse now; buying unlocks when the timer hits zero.

Product.shippingBody: North Macedonia only. Cash on delivery.

Cart.title: Cart
Cart.capNotice: Max 2 items per order — stock is limited and reserved when you order.

Checkout.title: Checkout
Checkout.name: Full name
Checkout.codSummary: You pay cash on delivery. No online payment.
Checkout.reserveNote: Your order reserves stock for 48 hours.

Order.turnstileFailed: That check didn't pass. Try again.
Order.rateLimited: Too many attempts from this network. Wait a moment and try again.
Order.soldOut: Someone got there first. The last one just went.
Order.notOpen: The drop isn't open right now.
Order.duplicatePhone: You already have a live order with this number for this drop.
Order.priceMissing: Our mistake: no price is set. You weren't charged. Try later.

Placeholder.notice: Design-system preview. Product data (name, price, sizes, composition, photos) is placeholder — the real values are entered by Vladimir in a later phase.

Styleguide.title: Design system
Styleguide.intro: Every state from the handover, live, driven by brand.md tokens.
Styleguide.sampleNote: Sample to show the token — not a real price.
